scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws NullPointerException when child is null
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = null;

scenarios.description: appendChild(child) on empty parent initializes childNodes and adds child at index 0
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); TextNode child = new TextNode("text");
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 1 and parent.childNodes.get(0) == child and child.siblingIndex() == 0
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("ul"); TextNode child = new TextNode("text");
assert parent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert parent.childNodes.get(0) == child; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0;

scenarios.description: appendChild(child) when parent already has one child reuses existing childNodes and adds second child at index 1
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("p"); TextNode c1 = new TextNode("a"); TextNode c2 = new TextNode("b"); parent.appendChild(c1);
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 2 and parent.childNodes.get(1) == c2 and c2.siblingIndex() == 1
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("p"); TextNode c1 = new TextNode("a"); TextNode c2 = new TextNode("b"); parent.appendChild(c1);
assert parent.childNodeSize() == 2; assert parent.childNodes.get(1) == c2; assert c2.siblingIndex() == 1;

scenarios.description: appendChild(child) moves child from old parent to new parent and updates sibling indices
scenarios.precondition: Element oldParent = new Element("div"); Element newParent = new Element("section"); Element child = new Element("span"); oldParent.appendChild(child);
scenarios.expectedResult: oldParent.childNodeSize() == 0 and newParent.childNodeSize() == 1 and newParent.childNodes.get(0) == child and child.parent() == newParent and child.siblingIndex() == 0
pseudocode: Element oldParent = new Element("div"); Element newParent = new Element("section"); Element child = new Element("span"); oldParent.appendChild(child);
assert oldParent.childNodeSize() == 0; assert newParent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert newParent.childNodes.get(0) == child; assert child.parent() == newParent; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0;
